infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PlayThru uses your location to show nearby courses first.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: PlayThru uses Face ID to keep your account secure.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PlayThru uses your photo library to let you set a profile picture and save your POPScore share card.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PlayThru uses your camera to take a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PlayThru saves your POPScore share card to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PlayThru may use the microphone when recording video content.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PlayThru to save your POPScore card to your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow PlayThru to save your POPScore card to your photos.

plugins.faceIDPermission: PlayThru uses Face ID to keep your account secure.
